```
"use client"

import * as React from "react"
import { Menu } from "@base-ui/react/menu"
import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"
import { ChevronDown } from "lucide-react"
import "./site-header.css"

// 定义 payload 类型
type NavPayload = {
  key: "home" | "articles" | "notes" | "moments" | "more"
}

// 创建共享的 menu handle
const navMenu = Menu.createHandle<NavPayload>()

// 导航数据
const navigationData = {
  home: {
    label: "首页",
    sections: [
      {
        title: "主要",
        items: [
          { label: "博客首页", href: "/", description: "浏览最新内容" },
          { label: "归档", href: "/archive", description: "按时间浏览" },
        ],
      },
      {
        title: "更多",
        items: [
          { label: "关于我", href: "/about" },
          { label: "站点地图", href: "/sitemap" },
          { label: "友情链接", href: "/links" },
          { label: "RSS 订阅", href: "/rss" },
        ],
      },
    ],
  },
  articles: {
    label: "文稿",
    categories: [
      { label: "技术笔记", href: "/articles/tech", count: 24 },
      { label: "生活随笔", href: "/articles/life", count: 12 },
      { label: "读书摘录", href: "/articles/reading", count: 8 },
      { label: "项目复盘", href: "/articles/projects", count: 5 },
    ],
    recentPosts: {
      "技术笔记": [
        { title: "深入理解 React 19", href: "/articles/react-19", date: "3天前" },
        { title: "TypeScript 5.4 新特性", href: "/articles/ts-54", date: "1周前" },
      ],
      "生活随笔": [
        { title: "周末的咖啡馆", href: "/articles/coffee", date: "2天前" },
        { title: "春日散步记", href: "/articles/spring-walk", date: "5天前" },
      ],
      "读书摘录": [
        { title: "原子习惯读后感", href: "/articles/atomic-habits", date: "1周前" },
        { title: "深度工作笔记", href: "/articles/deep-work", date: "2周前" },
      ],
      "项目复盘": [
        { title: "个人网站重构", href: "/articles/site-rebuild", date: "3天前" },
        { title: "开源项目经验", href: "/articles/opensource", date: "1周前" },
      ],
    },
    total: 49,
  },
  notes: {
    label: "手记",
    topics: [
      { label: "日常", href: "/notes/daily", count: 56 },
      { label: "旅行", href: "/notes/travel", count: 23 },
      { label: "美食记", href: "/notes/food", count: 34 },
      { label: "电影", href: "/notes/movies", count: 18 },
      { label: "音乐", href: "/notes/music", count: 12 },
      { label: "游戏", href: "/notes/games", count: 8 },
    ],
    latest: { title: "下午茶时光", time: "2小时前" },
  },
  moments: {
    label: "时光",
    types: [
      { label: "全部", href: "/moments", icon: "all" },
      { label: "照片", href: "/moments/photos", icon: "photo" },
      { label: "视频", href: "/moments/videos", icon: "video" },
      { label: "音频", href: "/moments/audio", icon: "audio" },
      { label: "引用", href: "/moments/quotes", icon: "quote" },
      { label: "短想法", href: "/moments/thoughts", icon: "thought" },
    ],
    stats: { year: 2024, count: 156 },
  },
  thoughts: {
    label: "思考",
    href: "/thoughts",
  },
  more: {
    label: "更多",
    items: [
      { label: "关于", href: "/about", description: "了解更多关于我" },
      { label: "友链", href: "/links", description: "我的朋友们" },
      { label: "留言", href: "/guestbook", description: "给我留言" },
    ],
  },
}

export function SiteHeader() {
  const [hoveredCategory, setHoveredCategory] = React.useState<string>("技术笔记")
  const currentPath = "/"

  return (
    <header className="fixed top-6 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 z-50">
      <nav className="flex items-center gap-1 rounded-full bg-background/95 backdrop-blur-sm px-2 py-1.5 shadow-lg shadow-foreground/5 border border-border/50">
        {/* 首页 */}
        <Menu.Trigger
          handle={navMenu}
          payload={{ key: "home" }}
          className="nav-trigger"
          data-active={currentPath === "/"}
        >
          {currentPath === "/" && <span className="active-dot" />}
          <span className={cn(currentPath === "/" && "ml-2")}>{navigationData.home.label}</span>
          <ChevronDown className="nav-chevron" />
        </Menu.Trigger>

        {/* 文稿 */}
        <Menu.Trigger
          handle={navMenu}
          payload={{ key: "articles" }}
          className="nav-trigger"
        >
          {navigationData.articles.label}
          <ChevronDown className="nav-chevron" />
        </Menu.Trigger>

        {/* 手记 */}
        <Menu.Trigger
          handle={navMenu}
          payload={{ key: "notes" }}
          className="nav-trigger"
        >
          {navigationData.notes.label}
          <ChevronDown className="nav-chevron" />
        </Menu.
... (truncated)
```

```
---
name: web-design-guidelines
description: Review UI code for Web Interface Guidelines compliance. Use when asked to "review my UI", "check accessibility", "audit design", "review UX", or "check my site against best practices".
metadata:
  author: vercel
  version: "1.0.0"
  argument-hint: <file-or-pattern>
---

# Web Interface Guidelines

Review files for compliance with Web Interface Guidelines.

## How It Works

1. Fetch the latest guidelines from the source URL below
2. Read the specified files (or prompt user for files/pattern)
3. Check against all rules in the fetched guidelines
4. Output findings in the terse `file:line` format

## Guidelines Source

Fetch fresh guidelines before each review:

```
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/vercel-labs/web-interface-guidelines/main/command.md
```

Use WebFetch to retrieve the latest rules. The fetched content contains all the rules and output format instructions.

## Usage

When a user provides a file or pattern argument:
1. Fetch guidelines from the source URL above
2. Read the specified files
3. Apply all rules from the fetched guidelines
4. Output findings using the format specified in the guidelines

If no files specified, ask the user which files to review.
```

```
        <div>
          <h3 className="dropdown-title">分类</h3>
          <Menu.Group>
            {navigationData.articles.categories.map((category) => (
              <Menu.LinkItem
                key={category.label}
                href={category.href}
                className={cn(
                  "dropdown-item category-item",
                  hoveredCategory === category.label && "active"
                )}
                onPointerEnter={() => onCategoryHover(category.label)}
              >
                <span className="category-indicator" />
                <span className="dropdown-item-label">{category.label}</span>
                <span className="category-count">{category.count}</span>
              </Menu.LinkItem>
            ))}
          </Menu.Group>
        </div>

        {/* 右侧：最近文章 */}
        <div>
          <h3 className="dropdown-title">最近发布</h3>
          <div className="posts-container" key={hoveredCategory}>
            {posts.map((post) => (
              <Menu.LinkItem key={post.title} href={post.href} className="dropdown-item post-item">
                <span className="dropdown-item-label line-clamp-1">{post.title}</span>
                <span className="dropdown-item-desc">{post.date}</span>
              </Menu.LinkItem>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* 底部：查看全部 */}
      <Menu.Separator className="dropdown-separator" />
      <Menu.LinkItem href="/articles" className="dropdown-item footer-item">
        <span>查看全部文稿</span>
        <span className="footer-count">{navigationData.articles.total}篇</span>
      </Menu.LinkItem>
    </div>
  )
}

// 手记内容
function NotesContent() {
  return (
    <div className="dropdown-content notes-content">
      <h3 className="dropdown-title">话题</h3>
      <div className="topics-grid">
        {navigationData.notes.topics.map((topic) => (
          <Menu.LinkItem key={topic.label} href={topic.href} className="topic-tag">
            {topic.label}
            <span className="topic-count">{topic.count}</span>
          </Menu.LinkItem>
        ))}
      </div>

      <Menu.Separator className="dropdown-separator" />
      <Menu.LinkItem href="/notes" className="dropdown-item footer-item">
        <span>最近手记：{navigationData.notes.latest.title}</span>
        <span className="footer-count">{navigationData.notes.latest.time}</span>
      </Menu.LinkItem>
    </div>
  )
}

// 时光内容
function MomentsContent() {
  return (
    <div className="dropdown-content moments-content">
      <Menu.Group>
        {navigationData.moments.types.map((type, index) => (
          <Menu.LinkItem
            key={type.label}
            href={type.href}
            className={cn("dropdown-item moment-item", index === 0 && "font-medium")}
          >
            <MomentIcon icon={type.icon} />
            {type.label}
          </Menu.LinkItem>
        ))}
      </Menu.Group>

      <Menu.Separator className="dropdown-separator" />
      <div className="moment-stats">
        {navigationData.moments.stats.year} 年 · {navigationData.moments.stats.count} 条记录
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}

// 更多内容
function MoreContent() {
  return (
    <div className="dropdown-content more-content">
      <Menu.Group>
        {navigationData.more.items.map((item) => (
          <Menu.LinkItem key={item.label} href={item.href} className="dropdown-item">
            <span className="dropdown-item-label">{item.label}</span>
            {item.description && (
              <span className="dropdown-item-desc">{item.description}</span>
            )}
          </Menu.LinkItem>
        ))}
      </Menu.Group>
    </div>
  )
}

// 时光图标组件
function MomentIcon({ icon }: { icon: string }) {
  const icons: Record<string, React.ReactNode> = {
    all: (
      <svg className="moment-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2">
        <rect x="3" y="3" width="7" height="7" rx="1" />

      </svg>
    ),
    video: (

        <rect x="2" y="5" width="20" height="14" rx="2" />
        <polygon points="10,9 10,15 15,12" fill="currentColor" />
      </svg>
    ),
    audio: (
      <svg className="moment-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stro
```

```
import './internal/grid.css'

import { memo } from 'react'

import { ErrorBoundary } from '~/components/common/ErrorBoundary'
import { clsxm } from '~/lib/helper'

import { AnimatedLogo } from './internal/AnimatedLogo'
import {
  HeaderCenterArea,
  HeaderLeftButtonArea,
  HeaderLogoArea,
} from './internal/HeaderArea'
import { HeaderContent } from './internal/HeaderContent'
import { HeaderDataConfigureProvider } from './internal/HeaderDataConfigureProvider'
import { HeaderDrawerButton } from './internal/HeaderDrawerButton'
import { UserAuth } from './internal/UserAuth'

export const Header = () => (
  <ErrorBoundary>
    <HeaderDataConfigureProvider>
      <MemoedHeader />
    </HeaderDataConfigureProvider>
  </ErrorBoundary>
)
const MemoedHeader = memo(() => {
  return (
    <div
      data-hide-print
      className="fixed top-0 z-[9] h-[4.5rem] w-0 lg:inset-x-0 lg:w-auto"
    >
      <div
        className={clsxm(
          'relative mx-auto w-[calc(100vw-var(--removed-body-scroll-bar-size,0px))] grid h-full min-h-0 max-w-7xl grid-cols-[4.5rem_auto_4.5rem] lg:px-8',
          'header--grid',
        )}
      >
        <HeaderLeftButtonArea>
          <HeaderDrawerButton />
        </HeaderLeftButtonArea>

        <HeaderLogoArea>
          <AnimatedLogo />
        </HeaderLogoArea>

        <HeaderCenterArea>
          <HeaderContent />
        </HeaderCenterArea>

        <div className="flex size-full items-center">
          <UserAuth />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  )
})

MemoedHeader.displayName = 'MemoedHeader'
```

```
'use client'

import clsx from 'clsx'

  AnimatePresence,
  LayoutGroup,

} from 'motion/react'

import { RootPortal } from '~/components/ui/portal'
import useDebounceValue from '~/hooks/common/use-debounce-value'
import { Link, usePathname } from '~/i18n/navigation'
import { clsxm } from '~/lib/helper'
import { useIsScrollUpAndPageIsOver } from '~/providers/root/page-scroll-info-provider'

import type { IHeaderMenu } from '../config'
import { useHeaderConfig } from './HeaderDataConfigureProvider'
import { useMenuOpacity } from './hooks'
import { MenuPopover } from './MenuPopover'

export const HeaderContent = () => (
  <LayoutGroup>
    <AnimatedMenu>
      <ForDesktop />
    </AnimatedMenu>
    <AccessibleMenu />
  </LayoutGroup>
)

const AccessibleMenu: Component = () => {
  const showShow = useDebounceValue(useIsScrollUpAndPageIsOver(600), 120)
  return (
    <RootPortal>
      <AnimatePresence>
        {showShow && (
          <m.div
            animate={{ y: 0 }}
            className="pointer-events-none fixed inset-x-0 top-4 z-10 mr-[var(--removed-body-scroll-bar-size)] flex justify-center"
            exit={{ y: -20, opacity: 0 }}
            initial={{ y: -20 }}
          >
            <ForDesktop />
          </m.div>
        )}
      </AnimatePresence>
    </RootPortal>
  )
}

const AnimatedMenu: Component = ({ children }) => {
  const opacity = useMenuOpacity()

  const shouldHideNavBg = opacity === 0
  return (
    <m.div
      className="duration-100"
      style={{
        opacity,
        visibility: opacity === 0 ? 'hidden' : 'visible',
      }}
    >
      {/* @ts-ignore */}
      {React.cloneElement(children, { shouldHideNavBg })}
    </m.div>
  )
}

const ForDesktop: Component<{
  shouldHideNavBg?: boolean
  animatedIcon?: boolean
}> = ({ className, shouldHideNavBg, animatedIcon = true }) => {
  const { config: headerMenuConfig } = useHeaderConfig()
  const pathname = usePathname()

  const mouseX = useMotionValue(0)
  const mouseY = useMotionValue(0)
  const radius = useMotionValue(0)
  const handleMouseMove = React.useCallback(
    ({ clientX, clientY, currentTarget }: React.MouseEvent) => {
      const bounds = currentTarget.getBoundingClientRect()
      mouseX.set(clientX - bounds.left)
      mouseY.set(clientY - bounds.top)
      radius.set(Math.hypot(bounds.width, bounds.height) / 2.5)
    },
    [mouseX, mouseY, radius],
  )

  const background = useMotionTemplate`radial-gradient(${radius}px circle at ${mouseX}px ${mouseY}px, var(--spotlight-color) 0%, transparent 65%)`

  return (
    <m.nav
      layout="size"
      className={clsxm(
        'relative',
        'rounded-full bg-gradient-to-b from-neutral-50/70 to-neutral-50/90',
        'shadow-lg shadow-neutral-800/5 ring-1 ring-neutral-900/5 backdrop-blur-md',
        'dark:from-neutral-900/70 dark:to-neutral-800/90 dark:ring-neutral-100/10',
        'group [--spotlight-color:oklch(from_var(--color-accent)_l_c_h_/_0.12)]',
        'pointer-events-auto duration-200',
        shouldHideNavBg && 'bg-none! shadow-none! ring-transparent!',
        className,
      )}
      onMouseMove={handleMouseMove}
    >
      {/* Spotlight overlay */}
      <m.div
        aria-hidden="true"
        className="pointer-events-none absolute -inset-px rounded-full opacity-0 transition-opacity duration-500 group-hover:opacity-100"
        style={{ background }}
      />
      <div className="flex px-4 font-medium text-neutral-9">
        {headerMenuConfig.map((section) => {
          const subItemActive =
            section.subMenu?.findIndex(
              (item) =>
                item.path === pathname ||
                pathname.slice(1) === item.path ||
                pathname.startsWith(`${item.path}/`),
            ) ?? -1

          return (
            <HeaderMenuItem
              iconLayout={animatedIcon}
              key={section.path}
              section={section}
              subItemActive={section.subMenu?.[subItemActive]}
              isActive={
                pathname === section.path ||
                (pathname.startsWith(`${section.path}/`) &&
                  !section.exclude?.includes(pathname)) ||
                subItemActive > -1 ||
                false
              }
            />
          )
        })}
      </div>
    </m.nav>
  )
}

const HeaderMenuItem = memo<{
  section: IHeaderMenu
  isActive: boolean
  subItemActive?: IHeaderMenu
  iconLayout?: boolean
}>(({ section, isActive, subItemActive, iconLayout }) => {
  const t = useTranslations('common')
  const href = useMemo(() => {
    let href = section.path
    if (section.search) {
      href += `?${new URLSearchParams(section.search).toString()}`
    }
    return href
  }, [s
... (truncated)
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="shell" data-tool-name="exec_command"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **exec_command** `sed -n '1,260p' apps/web/src/components/layout/header/internal/MenuPopover.tsx`</summary>
```
Chunk ID: 0df7df
Wall time: 0.0000 seconds

Original token count: 455
Output:
'use client'

import { useTranslations } from 'next-intl'
import * as React from 'react'
import { memo } from 'react'

import { FloatPopover } from '~/components/ui/float-popover'
import { Link } from '~/i18n/navigation'
import { clsxm } from '~/lib/helper'

import type { IHeaderMenu } from '../config'

export const MenuPopover: Component<{
  subMenu: IHeaderMenu['subMenu']
}> = memo(({ children, subMenu }) => {
  if (!subMenu) return children

  return (
    <FloatPopover
      headless
      offset={10}
      placement="bottom"
      popoverWrapperClassNames="z-[19] relative"
      strategy="fixed"
      triggerElement={<>{children}</>}
      popoverClassNames={clsxm([
        'select-none rounded-xl bg-neutral-50/60 outline-hidden dark:bg-neutral-900/60',
        'border border-neutral-900/5 shadow-lg shadow-neutral-800/5 backdrop-blur-md',
        'dark:border-neutral-100/10 dark:from-neutral-900/70 dark:to-neutral-800/90',
        'relative flex min-w-[130px] flex-col',
        'focus-visible:ring-0!',
      ])}
    >
      {subMenu.length > 0 && subMenu.map((m) => <Item key={m.path} {...m} />)}
    </FloatPopover>
  )
})
MenuPopover.displayName = 'MenuPopover'

const Item = memo(function Item(props: IHeaderMenu) {
  const { title, titleKey, path, icon } = props
  const t = useTranslations('common')

  const displayTitle = titleKey ? t(titleKey as any) : title

  return (
    <Link
      className="relative flex w-full items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 text-left duration-200 hover:bg-accent/5 hover:text-accent"
      href={`${path}`}
      key={path}
      role="button"
    >
      {!!icon && (
        <span className="flex w-5 shrink-0 items-center justify-center">
          {icon}
        </span>
      )}
      <span className="min-w-0 flex-1">{displayTitle}</span>
    </Link>
  )
})
```
</details></tool-use>

```
import type { ReactNode } from 'react'
import { createElement as h } from 'react'

import {
  FaSolidCircle,
  FaSolidCircleNotch,
  FaSolidComments,
  FaSolidDotCircle,
  FaSolidFeatherAlt,
  FaSolidHistory,
  FaSolidUserFriends,
  IcTwotoneSignpost,
  IonBook,
  MdiFlask,
  MdiLightbulbOn20,
  RMixPlanet,
} from '~/components/icons/menu-collection'

export interface IHeaderMenu {
  do?: () => void
  exclude?: string[]
  icon?: ReactNode
  path: string
  search?: Record<string, string>
  subMenu?: Omit<IHeaderMenu, 'exclude'>[]
  title: string
  titleKey?: string
  type?: string
}
export const headerMenuConfig: IHeaderMenu[] = [
  {
    title: '首页',
    titleKey: 'nav_home',
    path: '/',
    type: 'Home',
    icon: h(FaSolidDotCircle),
    subMenu: [],
  },
  {
    title: '文稿',
    titleKey: 'nav_posts',
    path: '/posts',
    type: 'Post',
    subMenu: [],
    icon: h(IcTwotoneSignpost),
    do() {
      window.__POST_LIST_ANIMATED__ = true
    },
  },
  {
    title: '手记',
    titleKey: 'nav_notes',
    type: 'Note',
    path: '/notes',
    icon: h(FaSolidFeatherAlt),
    exclude: ['/notes/topics'],
  },

  {
    title: '时光',
    titleKey: 'nav_timeline',
    icon: h(FaSolidHistory),
    path: '/timeline',
    subMenu: [
      {
        title: '手记',
        titleKey: 'nav_notes',
        icon: h(FaSolidFeatherAlt),
        path: '/timeline?type=note',
      },
      {
        title: '文稿',
        titleKey: 'nav_posts',
        icon: h(IonBook),
        path: '/timeline?type=post',
      },
      {
        title: '回忆',
        titleKey: 'nav_memories',
        icon: h(FaSolidCircle),
        path: '/timeline?memory=1',
      },
      {
        title: '专栏',
        titleKey: 'nav_topics',
        path: '/notes/topics',
        icon: h('i', {
          className: 'i-mingcute-align-bottom-fill flex center',
        }),
      },
    ],
  },

  {
    title: '思考',
    titleKey: 'nav_thinking',
    icon: h(MdiLightbulbOn20),
    path: '/thinking',
  },

  {
    title: '更多',
    titleKey: 'nav_more',
    icon: h(FaSolidCircleNotch),
    path: '#',
    subMenu: [
      {
        title: '友链',
        titleKey: 'nav_friends',
        icon: h(FaSolidUserFriends),
        path: '/friends',
      },
      {
        title: '项目',
        titleKey: 'nav_projects',
        icon: h(MdiFlask),
        path: '/projects',
      },
      {
        title: '一言',
        titleKey: 'nav_says',
        path: '/says',
        icon: h(FaSolidComments),
      },
      {
        title: '跃迁',
        titleKey: 'nav_travel',
        icon: h(RMixPlanet),
        path: 'https://travel.moe/go.html',
      },
    ],
  },
]
```

我看完后，结论很明确：这个复刻如果想像，不该只改 `desktopmenu` 的 className，应该把桌面导航从“普通下拉列表”升级成“按栏目定制的面板式导航”。

现状里桌面菜单主体在 [HeaderContent.tsx](<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/layout/header/internal/HeaderContent.tsx#L73) 到 [HeaderContent.tsx](<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/layout/header/internal/HeaderContent.tsx#L195)，下拉层在 [MenuPopover.tsx](<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/layout/header/internal/MenuPopover.tsx#L13) 到 [MenuPopover.tsx](<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/layout/header/internal/MenuPopover.tsx#L35)，配置模型在 [config.ts](<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/layout/header/config.ts#L19) 到 [config.ts](<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/layout/header/config.ts#L132)。问题是现在 `subMenu` 只能表达“一列 link 列表”，但你给的参考稿已经有这些能力：
- 顶部是胶囊型 nav + active indicator + chevron
- 下拉不是单列菜单，而是 2 列/标签网格/带统计信息的 panel
- 不同栏目有不同信息架构，不是统一模板

我的建议是这样做，性价比最高：

1. 保留整个 header 外壳，不动 [Header.tsx](<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/layout/header/Header.tsx#L19) 的 logo、auth、drawer 布局。
2. 重做 `ForDesktop` 和 `MenuPopover`，把当前“每项一个简单 popover”改成“每项可渲染不同 panel variant”。
3. 扩展 `IHeaderMenu`，不要只放 `subMenu`，新增类似 `panel`, `sections`, `featured`, `stats`, `tags` 这类字段。否则组件里会充满硬编码。
4. 视觉上直接借参考稿的 4 个关键点：
- 胶囊 nav 容器
- active item 左侧小圆点/图标位移
- trigger 右侧 chevron
- 半透明毛玻璃 dropdown panel
5. 交互上继续保留你现有的滚动后浮出的 `AccessibleMenu`，因为这是当前 header 的特性，但要让它复用同一套桌面菜单组件，避免两份逻辑分叉。

如果你要的是“高保真复刻”，我会建议再进一步：
- 把现在的 `FloatPopover` 方案换成共享 menu root/viewport，做一个统一的 hover dropdown 容器，这样切不同栏目时面板尺寸和位置会更像你给的参考设计
- 这样改动会稍大，但效果会明显更接近

如果你要的是“先落地，再打磨”，我建议分两步：
1. 先做视觉复刻：nav 胶囊、trigger、panel 外观、hover/open 行为
2. 再做数据结构升级：把 `首页 / 文稿 / 手记 / 时光 / 更多` 各自的 panel 内容做成配置化

我倾向于第二种推进方式。这样不会一下子把 header 体系全拆掉，但最后能长成你要的样子。

如果你要，我下一步可以直接给你做一版：
- 方案 A：低侵入，保留 `FloatPopover`
- 方案 B：高还原，改成共享 viewport 的 desktop menu

我更推荐 `B`。
